headline: Smurfit Westrock partners with Coca-Cola on World Cup packaging to capture spike in consumer demand
summary: DUBLIN & NEW YORK, July 07, 2026--Smurfit Westrock partnered with Coca-Cola China to launch a series of innovative paper-based packaging solutions for the brand’s 2026 World Cup campaign, designed to deliver standout impact across both retail and e-commerce channels.
